shortFormVideo.concept: Thirty-second private AI vs ChatGPT decision guide for local service and operations-heavy businesses.
shortFormVideo.hook: Not every AI workflow needs private infrastructure, but the sensitive ones need boundaries before prompts.
scenes: Open with two columns: quick public drafting vs sensitive business workflow.
Show examples: marketing outline, SOP search, client history, lead follow-up, finance review.
Highlight the filter: data sensitivity, repeatability, audit trail, and human review.
End with EB28 private AI and Recon Agent paths as the next step.
shortFormVideo.caption: Choose the right AI workflow before sensitive data ends up in the wrong place. Draft-only until an EB28-owned short-form channel is verified.
